﻿.. _dp-PaintLookUserMatrixGR:

CrDeviceProperty_PaintLookUserMatrixGR
=======================================

Get/Set the paint/look user matrix G-R.

    CrDataType: `CrDataType_Int16Range`

.. list-table::
  :widths: auto
  :header-rows: 1

  * - Value
    - Explanation

  * - variable
    - min

  * - variable
    - max

  * - variable
    - step

| The range value may changes depending on the model.
| 10 times the real value.
